title: Federation Sync Contract
description: Canonical contract for CIR-backed federation synchronization between instances. Defines allowed exchange surfaces for identity state propagation. Federation is a transport-level decision model and MUST NOT introduce, modify, validate, or infer identity truth beyond CIR registry-derived state.

contract_id.description: Unique identifier for this federation sync contract execution.

source_instance.description: Origin instance issuing CIR data reference. MUST correspond to a registry-valid instance identity.

target_instance.description: Destination instance receiving CIR synchronization data reference.

sync_mode.description: Defines synchronization type. Determines transport semantics only and does not affect identity authority.

cir_payload.description: CIR data being transported between instances. MUST conform structurally to CIR schema. Federation MUST treat this as opaque identity state data and MUST NOT validate or interpret identity semantics.

pik_ref.description: Reference to PIK. MUST NOT contain raw key material.

vsig_ref.description: Reference to VSIG object only. MUST NOT be inline signature data.

apa_ref.description: Reference to APA object. Non-authoritative resolution pointer.

identity_state.description: Replicated identity state value. Treated as opaque transport data; interpretation occurs only at higher decision layers.

delta_metadata.description: Optional transport metadata describing synchronization context. MUST NOT influence identity truth, registry state, or decision evaluation.

sync_state.description: Resulting transport state of synchronization process (non-authoritative).
